name: Trick or treat?
description:
【Lucky or unlucky?】

Mary Jane Watson

Mary Jane Watson was the main love interest of Peter Parker, her childhood friend and the superhero known as Spider-Man. She came from a broken household due to her father's verbal abuse and need to support her family, and as a result had a difficult childhood. She very often visited her aunt Anna, a close friend of May Parker who saw her as the ideal love for her nephew Peter. At first Peter was reluctant to date her, not only due to their contrasting personalities, but also due to being in a relationship with Gwen Stacy at the time, who was also friends with MJ. Unbeknownst to Peter, she was aware of his secret identity as Spider-Man, having seen him change into his costume the night his Uncle Ben died. After the tragic passing of Gwen, MJ was there to support a broken-down Peter, which marked the start of their long lasting relationship. Thanks to her good looks, acting skills and fashion sense, MJ worked as a professional actress and fashion supermodel. They eventually married despite her previously reluctance, and from then on MJ directly helped him in his superhero journey, though she was often put in danger due to this, the most notable case being her horrific experience with the vengeful Venom. She and Peter once had a child they named May, and attempted to have a new normal life in Oregon where MJ began work as a theater teacher. Sadly, as soon as the baby was born, she was kidnapped and killed by Peter's archenemy, Norman Osborn. Another traumatizing event involved her getting kidnapped by a crazed stalker, leaving her to be believed dead, though Peter never gave up hope and eventually rescued her. They remained together for years, until their marriage was erased by Mephisto as part of deal to save May's life. As a result of this, their relationship became strained ever since,[40] to the point MJ attempted to move on with new partners, though these new relationships were short-lived. MJ would become an executive assistant of Tony Stark at Star Industries, after her nightclub called MJ's was destroyed during a super villain/super hero conflict. MJ and Peter attempted to rekindle their relationship, and in spite of the machinations of the Kindreds and Mephisto, they became a couple again. Unfortunately, they broke up once more after entering an alternate reality while fighting the Emissary, where MJ and Peter encountered a man named Paul Rabin. She eventually used a device to sent Peter back home, and spent nearly four years with Paul due to time dilation before Peter's return. During that time, MJ and Paul had found and adopted two kids to raise as their own. Apparently in a relationship, MJ refused to leave Paul, and they continued their family life in Earth-616. MJ took the codename of the superheroine Jackpot, until recently becoming the new host of the Venom symbiote and the foster mother of Dylan Brock.

Felicia hardy

Nimble and playful, Felicia Hardy is a cat burglar who lives up to her profession literally, stalking the nightly rooftops as the renowned and elusive Black Cat. Born to the master thief Walter Hardy, Felicia devoted herself to a life of crime at a young age after his arrest, being taken under the wing of her father's former mentor, the Black Fox. A thrill-seeker to a fault, Felicia finds her true reward not in the bounty she steals, but in the act of stealing itself. First crossing paths with Spider-Man while attempting to free her dying father from prison, the Black Cat quickly became tangled in the hero's web.
